title: Antimations
description: Cancel swing and other animations on players
body:
# Antimations

Cancels swing and other animations on players. Packets will still be sent so the mod is safe to use for anticheats.

Use /antimations or the config button in the mod list to open the menu.
![config image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82ea7aa6014558efc67f716a1d530547b3ff2f99.png)
